import axios from "axios"; import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; function AddProduct() { const [categorylist, setCategorylist] = React.useState([]); useEffect(() => { axios.get(`/api/all-category`).then(res => { if (res.data.status === 200) { // Ensure that we are setting an array to the state if (Array.isArray(res.data.categories)) { setCategorylist(res.data.categories); } } }); }, []); return (
